title: Watch Live: Kristi Noem Testifies Before the Senate
author: Breitbart News
fullText:
Department of Homeland Security (DHS) Secretary Kristi Noem testifies before the Senate Judiciary Committee on Tuesday, February 3.
Noem’s testimony comes as Democrats refuse to pass funding for DHS in opposition to operations by Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE).
The Democrats’ shutdown of DHS comes among heightened concerns of terrorist attacks in retaliation for the death of Iranian leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.

summary:
Department of Homeland Security (DHS) Secretary Kristi Noem testifies before the Senate Judiciary Committee on Tuesday, February 3.
The post Watch Live: Kristi Noem Testifies Before the Senate appeared first on Breitbart.
